title: Chapter 157
content:

She smiled, a smile that relayed she had my fate in her hands, and she chuckled softly and said, “You do not have to worry so much. I don’t intend to relay this information to my husband. At least not just yet.”

Which means I'd better cooperate if I don’t want this to be known to Carlson. It sounded like she was doing me a favor, but what she was really doing was having me at her beck and call.

The only upside is that I won’t be in prison for that.

“Besides,” Elara leaned back in her chair, relaxed, keeping her movements graceful, “We don’t know for sure whether or not it was your bizarre ability or some other factor.”

Yeah, right. She was sure of it a second ago, so she was sure of it right now. She was just playing games, preparing the board for her next move.

“For that, I have prepared another test. Another maid of mine whom I trust enough to keep this matter secret.”

She must have known about my worries, so there was a good chance she was keeping tabs on me.

As long as I was inside this house, it was better to cooperate with Elara rather than with Carlson.
